note: Added DebuggerDisplay attributes to 7 public types (Socket, WgDevice, WgConfig, WgPeer, NetworkStream, WgDeviceStats, WgException). Created SingleFileImportTests.cs with 24 tests covering: single-file import access for all public types, disambiguation with System.Net.Sockets via fully-qualified names, no ambiguous references for Wg-prefixed types, DebuggerDisplay attribute verification, XML doc coverage check, and internal type accessibility. All 35 namespace-related tests pass.
